steps.t: Lúfa, Edhild, and Reeve Fríthbert are in the Mead Hall of Stoke. Thane Torferth told you that Lúfa and the children wished to say their farewells to y…
Thane Torferth is in the Mead Hall of Stoke. You should speak with Thane Torferth again.
A herald from the Stonedeans arrived in the Mead Hall of Stoke. You should speak with the herald from the Stonedeans.
Woodhurst lies to the north-west of Stoke, in the Stonedeans. You should find someone near Woodhurst who might give you some insight into the situatio…
